title: VerificationResult
description: Result of a single email-address verification call against the Email Verifier API 16-point engine.

event.description: Fine-grained event code returned by the verification engine.

emailSuggested.description: Suggested correction when a domain typo is detected.

mailbox.description: Local part of the verified address.

domain.description: Domain part of the verified address.

mxIp.description: IPv4 address of the resolved mail exchange server.

mxLocation.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the MX server.

possibleSpamtrap.description: Address matches known honeypot or spam-trap patterns.

isComplainer.description: Address belongs to a known frequent spam complainer.

isDisposable.description: Address belongs to a disposable / burner provider.

isFreeService.description: Address is on a free consumer mailbox provider.

isRoleAccount.description: Address is a role / departmental alias.

isGibberish.description: Local part appears to be machine-generated.

remaining.description: Customer credit balance remaining after the request.
